components.name: HdsAccordion
components.description: The `Accordion` component serves as a wrapper to group one or more `Accordion::Item` components.

args.name: forceState
args.description: Controls the state of all items within a group. Can be used to expand or collapse all items at once.

args.name: titleTag
args.description: The HTML tag that wraps the content of each Accordion Item "toggle" block.

components.name: HdsAccordionItem
components.description: The `Accordion::Item` component, yielded as contextual component.

args.name: ariaLabel
args.description: Accepts a string. The `ariaLabel` value is applied to the HTML button which controls visibility of the content block content.

args.name: containsInteractive
args.description: Controls whether the entire toggle block is interactive for toggling the content display or whether only the chevron button itself is interactive which allows for adding other interactive content in the toggle area.

args.name: forceState
args.description: Controls the state of an `Accordion::Item` after the initial render by overriding its current state.

args.name: isOpen
args.description: Toggles the visibility of the content. To display content on page load, set the value to `true`.

args.name: isStatic
args.description: Removes the ability to interact with the toggle and hides the chevron element when set to `true`.

args.name: onClickToggle
args.description: Callback function invoked when the toggle is clicked.

yields.name: close
yields.description: A function to programmatically close the `Accordion::Item`.
